m := 4;
n := 7;
g := 61;
F<i>:=CyclotomicField(4);
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(F,2);

68)*u^5 + (16*i + 36)*u^4 + (8*i + 3)*u^3 + (3*i + 1)*u^2 + i*u)*v^3 + (-15*u^22 + (-15*i - 8)*u^21 + (-8*i + 5)*u^20 + (5*i + 16)*u^19 + (16*i + 5)*u^18 + (-205*i + 14)*u^17 + (56*i + 232)*u^16 + (319*i - 16)*u^15 + (32*i - 296)*u^14 + (-299*i - 12)*u^13 + (-32*i + 279)*u^12 + (233*i - 16)*u^11 + (-56*i + 25)*u^10 + (-25*i + 14)*u^9 + (-16*i + 28)*u^8 + (-5*i + 16)*u^7 + (8*i + 5)*u^6 + (-8*i - 8)*u^5 + 8*u^4)*v^2 + (u^21 + (i + 1)*u^20 + (i + 1)*u^19 + (i + 1)*u^18 + (i + 2)*u^17 + (23*i + 2)*u^16 + (-i - 19)*u^15 + (-25*i + 5)*u^14 + (-i + 30)*u^13 + (25*i + 6)*u^12 + (i - 19)*u^11 + (-23*i + 5)*u^10 + (i + 2)*u^9 + (-i + 2)*u^8 + (-i + 1)*u^7 + (-i + 1)*u^6 + (-i + 1)*u^5 + u^4)*v - i*u^15 + u^14 + i*u^13 - u^12 - i*u^11 + u^10 + i*u^9;
q := (u*v-u-v-1)/(u*v+u-v-1);
t := -(u*v-u-v-1)/(u*v+u+v+1);
E := [R!1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
